results.title: “El Niño” threatens to worsen the global humanitarian crisis; UN prepares up to $100 million to respond
results.description: The return of the El Niño phenomenon is a threat that intensifies extreme heat, causes relentless droughts and massive floods

results.title: Fujairah bunker fuel sales halve as US-Iran war disrupts supplies
results.description: Fujairah bunker fuel sales dropped significantly in early 2026. This decline occurred after the U.S.-Iran war impacted supplies near the Strait of Hormuz. Zhoushan port in China is now set to overtake Fujairah as a major hub. Supply disruptions continued to affect Fujairah's market throughout the period. Inventories briefly rebounded after a ceasefire but remained uncertain.
